iti56:1.3: "Tayome, bhikkhave, āsavā. Katame tayo? Kāmāsavo, bhavāsavo, avijjāsavo – ime kho, bhikkhave, tayo āsavā"ti. Etamatthaṁ bhagavā avoca. Tatthetaṁ iti vuccati:
iti56:1.4:
"Samāhito sampajāno,
sato buddhassa sāvako;
Āsave ca pajānāti,
āsavānañca sambhavaṁ.
iti56:1.5:
Yattha cetā nirujjhanti,
maggañca khayagāminaṁ;
Āsavānaṁ khayā bhikkhu,
nicchāto parinibbuto"ti.
iti56:1.6:
Ayampi attho vutto bhagavatā, iti me sutanti.
Sattamaṁ.
